en: And I saw a beast rising out of the sea, with ten horns and seven heads, with ten diadems on its horns and blasphemous names on its heads.
zh: 我又看見一隻獸從海裡上來，有十角七頭，十角上戴著十個皇冠，七頭上有褻瀆的名號。

en: And the beast that I saw was like a leopard; its feet were like a bear's, and its mouth was like a lion's mouth. And to it the dragon gave his power and his throne and great authority.
zh: 我所看見的獸，樣子好像豹，腳像熊的腳，口像獅子的口。龍把自己的能力、王位和大權柄，都交給了牠。

en: One of its heads seemed to have a mortal wound, but its mortal wound was healed, and the whole earth marveled as they followed the beast.
zh: 獸的七頭中有一個似乎受了致命傷，但那致命傷卻醫好了。全地的人都很驚奇，跟從那獸。

en: And they worshiped the dragon, for he had given his authority to the beast, and they worshiped the beast, saying, "Who is like the beast, and who can fight against it?"
zh: 因為龍把權柄交給了獸，大家就拜龍，也拜獸，說：“有誰可以跟這獸相比？有誰能與牠作戰呢？”

en: And the beast was given a mouth uttering haughty and blasphemous words, and it was allowed to exercise authority for forty-two months.
zh: 龍又給了那獸一張說誇大和褻瀆話的嘴巴，也給了牠權柄可以任意而行四十二個月。

en: It opened its mouth to utter blasphemies against God, blaspheming his name and his dwelling, that is, those who dwell in heaven.
zh: 獸就開口向 神說褻瀆的話，褻瀆他的名和他的帳幕，以及那些住在天上的。

en: Also it was allowed to make war on the saints and to conquer them. And authority was given it over every tribe and people and language and nation,
zh: 牠得了允許能跟聖徒作戰，並且能勝過他們；又有權柄給了牠，可以管轄各支派、各民族、各方言、各邦國。

en: and all who dwell on earth will worship it, everyone whose name has not been written before the foundation of the world in the book of life of the Lamb that was slain.
zh: 所有住在地上的人，名字沒有記在創世以來被殺的羊羔之生命冊上的，都要拜牠。

en: If anyone has an ear, let him hear:
If anyone is to be taken captive, to captivity he goes; if anyone is to be slain with the sword, with the sword must he be slain. Here is a call for the endurance and faith of the saints.
zh: 如果人應該被俘擄， 就必被俘擄； 如果人應該被刀殺， 就必被刀殺。 在這裡聖徒要有忍耐和信心！

en: Then I saw another beast rising out of the earth. It had two horns like a lamb and it spoke like a dragon.
zh: 我又看見另一隻獸從地裡上來。牠有兩個角，好像羊羔，說話好像龍。

en: It exercises all the authority of the first beast in its presence, and makes the earth and its inhabitants worship the first beast, whose mortal wound was healed.
zh: 牠在頭一隻獸面前，行使頭一隻獸的一切權柄。牠使全地和住在地上的人，都拜那受過致命傷而醫好了的頭一隻獸。

en: It performs great signs, even making fire come down from heaven to earth in front of people,
zh: 牠又行大奇事，甚至在人面前叫火從天上降在地上。

en: and by the signs that it is allowed to work in the presence of the beast it deceives those who dwell on earth, telling them to make an image for the beast that was wounded by the sword and yet lived.
zh: 牠得了能力，在頭一隻獸面前能行奇事，迷惑了住在地上的人，吩咐住在地上的人，要為那受過刀傷而還活著的獸做個像。

en: And it was allowed to give breath to the image of the beast, so that the image of the beast might even speak and might cause those who would not worship the image of the beast to be slain.
zh: 又有能力賜給牠，可以把氣息給獸像，使獸像能夠說話，並且能夠殺害那些不拜獸像的人。

en: Also it causes all, both small and great, both rich and poor, both free and slave, to be marked on the right hand or the forehead,
zh: 那從地裡上來的獸，又要所有的人，無論大小貧富，自由的和作奴隸的，都在右手或額上，給自己作個記號。

en: so that no one can buy or sell unless he has the mark, that is, the name of the beast or the number of its name.
zh: 這記號就是獸的名字或獸名的數字，除了那有記號的，誰也不能買，誰也不能賣。

en: This calls for wisdom: let the one who has understanding calculate the number of the beast, for it is the number of a man, and his number is 666.
zh: 在這裡要有智慧。有悟性的人，就讓他計算獸的數字，因為這是人的數字，它的數字是六百六十六。
